title: cleisostoma piliferum
intro: Cleisostoma piliferum, also known as the hairy cleisostoma, is a species of orchid native to tropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cleisostoma piliferum include the potential treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas or infusions, as well as being used in traditional folk remedies, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
